message:
feat(agent-detection): add readStreamSafe() helper for bounded stream reading

Add a utility function to safely read from ReadableStream<Uint8Array> with
configurable byte limits to prevent memory exhaustion:

- MAX_SAFE_OUTPUT_BYTES constant (1MB) for internal safety checks
- readStreamSafe(stream, maxBytes) function that:
  - Reads chunks incrementally via stream reader
  - Stops accumulating content after maxBytes reached
  - Cancels the stream entirely if drainLimit (5x maxBytes) is exceeded
  - Uses TextDecoder with stream mode for proper UTF-8 handling
  - Cleans up reader lock in finally block
  - Handles errors gracefully (ignores stream errors)

This prevents unbounded memory consumption when reading agent output
streams of unknown size, providing a safe primitive for detection
logic that needs to inspect process output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
